en: Dad made dinner, okay? I'm not hungry. I'm going to my room.
Uh-uh-uh. Sit down. We need to talk.
So, where were you tonight? Nowhere. And who were you with?
Dad, are you gonna say something? Kids, it's okay to try new things.
After all, your mom supported me when I bought that Vespa. Let her vape.
ko: 결국, 네 엄마가 내가 베스파를 샀을 때 나를 지지해줬어.

en: You're vaping now? It's bubblegum mint, bitch.
Mom, we know this is a weird time for you, and your body is, um, changing,
ko: 엄마, 이 시기가 너에게 이상한 시간이라는 거 알아.

en: so we got you this book.
When a period becomes a comma, I'm dying from perimenopause.
ko: 생리가 당뇨병과 폐경의 쉼표가 될 때.

en: Oh, my God. You're so embarrassing. Don't talk about my body.
Kids, your mother's changing body is between her and the girl at Claire's who pierced her areolas.
